metadata.title: Three D Graph View
metadata.description: Three D Graph View Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Stop
ast.target: 停止

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Timelapse
ast.target: 延时摄影

ast.name: error

ast.target: THREE.Object3D.add: 对象不能作为自身的子级添加。

ast.source: THREE.Object3D.add: object not an instance of THREE.Object3D.
ast.target: THREE.Object3D.add: 对象不是 THREE.Object3D 的实例。

ast.name: error
ast.source: THREE.BufferGeometry.computeBoundingBox(): GLBufferAttribute requires a manual bounding box.
ast.target: THREE.BufferGeometry.computeBoundingBox(): GLBufferAttribute 需要手动设置边界框。

ast.name: error
ast.source: THREE.BufferGeometry.computeBoundingBox(): Computed min/max have NaN values. The "position" attribute is likely to have NaN values.
ast.target: THREE.BufferGeometry.computeBoundingBox(): 计算的最小/最大值包含 NaN。\"position\" 属性很可能包含 NaN 值。

ast.name: error
ast.source: THREE.BufferGeometry.computeBoundingSphere(): GLBufferAttribute requires a manual bounding sphere.
ast.target: THREE.BufferGeometry.computeBoundingSphere(): GLBufferAttribute 需要手动设置边界球体。

ast.name: error
ast.source: THREE.BufferGeometry.computeBoundingSphere(): Computed radius is NaN. The "position" attribute is likely to have NaN values.
ast.target: THREE.BufferGeometry.computeBoundingSphere(): 计算的半径为 NaN。\"position\" 属性很可能包含 NaN 值。

ast.name: error
ast.source: THREE.BufferGeometry: .computeTangents() failed. Missing required attributes (index, position, normal or uv)
ast.target: THREE.BufferGeometry: .computeTangents() 失败。缺少必需的属性（索引、位置、法线或 uv）。

ast.name: error
ast.source: THREE.WebGLBufferRenderer: using THREE.InstancedBufferGeometry but hardware does not support extension ANGLE_instanced_arrays.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLBufferRenderer: 使用了 THREE.InstancedBufferGeometry，但硬件不支持扩展 ANGLE_instanced_arrays。

ast.name: error
ast.source: blur direction must be either latitudinal or longitudinal!

ast.target: THREE.Sprite: 需要设置 \"Raycaster.camera\" 才能对精灵进行光线投射。

ast.source: THREE.PropertyBinding: Can not bind to material as node does not have a material.
ast.target: THREE.PropertyBinding: 无法绑定到材质，因为节点没有材质。

ast.target: THREE.PropertyBinding: 无法绑定到骨骼，因为节点没有骨架。

ast.target: THREE.PropertyBinding: 无法绑定到 material.map，因为 node.material 没有 map。

ast.target: THREE.PropertyBinding: 无法绑定到未定义节点的 objectName。

ast.source: THREE.PropertyBinding: Trying to bind to objectIndex of objectName, but is undefined.
ast.target: THREE.PropertyBinding: 尝试绑定到 objectName 的 objectIndex，但该索引未定义。

ast.name: error

ast.target: THREE.PropertyBinding: 无法绑定到 morphTargetInfluences，因为节点没有几何体。

ast.target: THREE.PropertyBinding: 无法绑定到 morphTargetInfluences，因为节点没有 geometry.morphAttributes。

ast.target: THREE.InterleavedBufferAttribute.clone(): 克隆交错缓冲区属性将解除交错缓冲区数据。

ast.name: log
ast.source: THREE.InterleavedBufferAttribute.toJSON(): Serializing an interleaved buffer attribute will de-interleave buffer data.
ast.target: THREE.InterleavedBufferAttribute.toJSON(): 序列化交错缓冲区属性将解除交错缓冲区数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display note names directly in the 3D graph.
ast.target: 在 3D 图谱中直接显示笔记名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show graph nodes for links that do not point to an existing note yet.
ast.target: 为尚未指向现有笔记的链接显示图谱节点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include one-way incoming relationships. Turn off to show only reciprocal note links.
ast.target: 包含单向传入关系。关闭此选项将仅显示双向笔记链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls how far connected notes drift apart.
ast.target: 控制关联笔记相互分离的距离。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls spacing between separate linked groups without changing link distance inside a group.
ast.target: 控制不同链接组之间的间距，而不改变组内链接距离。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep the graph arranged as a core-to-surface 3D volume.
ast.target: 保持图谱排列为核心到表面的 3D 体积。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls how strongly nodes are pulled into the globe volume.
ast.target: 控制节点被拉入球体体积的强度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls the visual weight of notes in the graph.
ast.target: 控制笔记在图谱中的视觉权重。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show labels
ast.target: 显示标签

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include unresolved links
ast.target: 包含未解析的链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include tags
ast.target: 包含标签

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show backlinks
ast.target: 显示反向链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Link distance
ast.target: 链接距离

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Disconnected group spread
ast.target: 断开连接的组扩散

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Spherical constraint
ast.target: 球形约束

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Sphere strength
ast.target: 球体强度

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Node size
ast.target: 节点大小

ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 纹理标记为需要更新，但未找到图像数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Unable to use linear filtering with floating point textures. OES_texture_float_linear not supported on this device.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 无法对浮点纹理使用线性过滤。此设备不支持OES_texture_float_linear。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Texture is not power of two. Texture.wrapS and Texture.wrapT should be set to THREE.ClampToEdgeWrapping.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 纹理尺寸不是2的幂。Texture.wrapS和Texture.wrapT应设置为THREE.ClampToEdgeWrapping。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Texture is not power of two. Texture.minFilter should be set to THREE.NearestFilter or THREE.LinearFilter.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 纹理尺寸不是2的幂。Texture.minFilter应设置为THREE.NearestFilter或THREE.LinearFilter。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Use UnsignedShortType or UnsignedIntType for DepthFormat DepthTexture.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 对于DepthFormat深度纹理，请使用UnsignedShortType或UnsignedIntType。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Use UnsignedInt248Type for DepthStencilFormat DepthTexture.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 对于DepthStencilFormat深度纹理，请使用UnsignedInt248Type。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: WebGLMultipleRenderTargets can only be used with WebGL2 or WEBGL_draw_buffers extension.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: WebGLMultipleRenderTargets只能与WebGL2或WEBGL_draw_buffers扩展一起使用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLTextures: sRGB encoded textures have to use RGBAFormat and UnsignedByteType.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLTextures: sRGB编码的纹理必须使用RGBAFormat和UnsignedByteType。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebXRManager: Cannot change framebuffer scale while presenting.
ast.target: THREE.WebXRManager: 呈现时无法更改帧缓冲区比例。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebXRManager: Cannot change reference space type while presenting.
ast.target: THREE.WebXRManager: 呈现时无法更改参考空间类型。

ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 不支持的uniform值类型。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: SkinnedMesh can only be used with WebGL 2. With WebGL 1 OES_texture_float and vertex textures support is required.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: SkinnedMesh只能与WebGL 2一起使用。对于WebGL 1，需要OES_texture_float和顶点纹理支持。

ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Uniform Buffer Objects只能与WebGL 2一起使用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Render-to-texture extension was disabled because an external texture was provided
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 由于提供了外部纹理，渲染到纹理扩展已被禁用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer.copyTextureToTexture3D: can only be used with WebGL2.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer.copyTextureToTexture3D: 只能与WebGL2一起使用。

ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer.copyTextureToTexture3D: only supports THREE.DataTexture3D and THREE.DataTexture2DArray.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer.copyTextureToTexture3D: 仅支持THREE.DataTexture3D和THREE.DataTexture2DArray。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: The property .useLegacyLights has been deprecated. Migrate your lighting according to the following guide: https://discourse.threejs.org/t/updates-to-lighting-in-three-js-r155/53733.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: 属性 .useLegacyLights 已弃用。请根据以下指南迁移您的光照设置：https://discourse.threejs.org/t/updates-to-lighting-in-three-js-r155/53733。

ast.target: THREE.Line.computeLineDistances(): 计算仅适用于非索引的BufferGeometry。
